stats.name: Ramp
stats.description: Build-up, durability, and the ability to keep your engine moving when the city throws a boss monster at you.

stats.name: Combo
stats.description: Sequencing, rules knowledge, fast reads, and turning two small plays into one ridiculous answer.

stats.name: Tempo
stats.description: Initiative, timing, footwork, and acting before the boss monster gets a second phase.

stats.name: Aggro
stats.description: Pressure, raw force, stamina, and the willingness to solve a problem before it stabilizes.

stats.name: Control
stats.description: Card energy, flashy effects, disruption, burst damage, and making the field behave on your terms.

stats.name: Synergy
stats.description: Teamwork, monster rapport, combo glue, and the mysterious power of believing the next draw matters.

jobs.name: Duelist
jobs.description: A Duel Disk showboat who lives for Normal Summons, Trap Cards, chain timing, and one last Heart of the Cards topdeck.

skills.name: Normal Summon
skills.description: Normal Summon a scrappy monster, then set one face-down Trap Card for cover.

effects.message: You Normal Summon a scrappy monster to hit {target} for {damage} damage.
Your face-down Trap Card guards {guard} damage from the next hit.

skills.name: Chain Link 2
skills.description: Cut into the enemy play with perfect chain timing.

effects.message: Your Chain Link 2 response catches {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Mirror Force
skills.description: Flip the classic Trap Card and turn an attack back into the attacker.

effects.message: Mirror Force snaps shut on {target} for {damage} damage.
The Trap Card backlash leaves you braced behind crackling cardboard.

skills.name: Blue-Eyes Entrance
skills.description: Call your inner Blue-Eyes White Dragon moment for damage and dramatic protection.

effects.message: Your Blue-Eyes entrance staggers {target} for {damage} damage.
The Blue-Eyes glare guards you through the next exchange.

skills.name: Heart of the Cards
skills.description: Topdeck the exact answer and turn one card into a duel-ending combo.

effects.message: Heart of the Cards detonates around {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Extended Chain
skills.description: You can carry one response deeper. Chain Links now cap at five, strengthening every chained hit and Trap Card guard.

skills.name: Set Five, Pass
skills.description: Load the back row with answers, chip the opponent with a face-down feint, and dare them to play into it.

effects.message: A face-down feint clips {target} for {damage} damage.
Your loaded back row guards {guard} damage from the next attacks.

skills.name: Solemn Judgment
skills.description: Pay two Chain Links to reject the enemy play and seal the field behind a layered negation.

effects.message: Solemn Judgment rejects {target}'s play for {damage} damage.
The negation seals the field, guarding {guard} damage for three attacks.

skills.name: Dark Magician Combination
skills.description: Spend three Chain Links on a master-and-apprentice spell sequence that leaves one warding circle behind.

effects.message: A master-and-apprentice combination crashes into {target} for {damage} damage.
The spell circle guards {guard} damage from the counterattack.

skills.name: Exodia, Obliterate!
skills.description: Cash in a complete five-link chain, reveal the forbidden win condition, and end the duel in one impossible answer.

effects.message: The five-piece win condition answers {target} with {damage} damage: OBLITERATE!
The forbidden aura guards {guard} damage while the dust settles.

mechanic.name: Chain Links
mechanic.description: Build a response chain with attacks and setup skills. Every link strengthens Duelist damage and Trap Card guards; finishers cash the chain in.

jobs.name: Trainer
jobs.description: A Pokemon Trainer who fights beside a partner monster, burns through Potions, and knows exactly when to call for evolution.

skills.name: Quick Attack
skills.description: Send your partner Pokemon in first for priority damage and a morale boost.

effects.message: Your partner Pokemon uses Quick Attack on {target} for {damage} damage.
Your partner checks back in, restoring {healing} HP.

skills.name: Potion Toss
skills.description: Use a Potion mid-fight, because apparently the bag menu still works in Cardbound City.

effects.message: Your Potion toss trips up {target} for {damage} damage.
The Potion restores {healing} HP.

skills.name: Double Battle
skills.description: Run a Double Battle pattern that hits twice and gives the team room to recover.

effects.message: Your Double Battle rush rolls through {target} for {damage} damage.
Your team regroups for {healing} HP.

skills.name: Light Screen
skills.description: Throw up Light Screen pressure: chip the foe while the party steadies itself.

effects.message: Your Light Screen flashes against {target} for {damage} damage.
The Light Screen steadies you for {healing} HP.
Light Screen blunts the next hits for {guard} damage.

skills.name: Mega Evolution
skills.description: Push your partner into a Mega Evolution surge of damage and recovery.

effects.message: Mega Evolution blasts {target} for {damage} damage.
The Mega Evolution surge restores {healing} HP.

skills.name: Best Friends
skills.description: You and your partner enter every battle already in sync, beginning with two Partner Bond.

skills.name: Helping Hand
skills.description: Coordinate a safe setup turn that distracts the opponent, restores your footing, and brings the partnership online.

effects.message: Your partner's distraction catches {target} for {damage} damage.
The teamwork restores {healing} HP.
Your partner screens the next attacks for {guard} damage.

skills.name: Full Restore
skills.description: Spend two Partner Bond on an emergency reset that sacrifices pressure for a deep heal and lasting protection.

effects.message: The Full Restore spray catches {target} for {damage} damage.
Full Restore recovers {healing} HP.
Your refreshed partner guards {guard} damage for three attacks.

skills.name: Terastal Team-Up
skills.description: Turn your shared resolve crystalline for an aggressive combination that rebuilds Partner Bond as it lands.

effects.message: Your crystal-bright team-up drives through {target} for {damage} damage.
The shared resolve restores {healing} HP.

skills.name: Champion's Bond
skills.description: Commit a full partnership meter to the final command only a champion and their most trusted partner can answer together.

effects.message: Your partner answers your faith, restoring {healing} HP.
Champion's Bond guards {guard} damage from the next attacks.
Your final command lands on {target} for {damage} damage.

mechanic.name: Partner Bond
mechanic.description: Coordinated moves build Partner Bond. Bond greatly improves healing and adds a little damage and protection before Mega Evolution spends it.

jobs.name: Planeswalker
jobs.description: A Magic-slinging Planeswalker who fixes mana, stacks spells, floods the board with tokens, and ends fights with an ultimate.

skills.name: Lightning Bolt
skills.description: Cast the classic red answer: three words, one very clear problem solved.

effects.message: Lightning Bolt hits {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Cultivate
skills.description: Fix your colors with Cultivate, then channel the spare mana into a hit.

effects.message: Cultivate fixes a burst through {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Raise the Alarm
skills.description: Flood the board with tokens until the monster realizes the small bodies add up.

effects.message: Raise the Alarm sends tokens at {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Counterspell
skills.description: Counter the enemy play and leave enough blue shimmer behind to blunt the next swing.

effects.message: Counterspell snaps around {target} for {damage} damage.
Residual blue wards bend the next attacks aside.

skills.name: Planeswalker Ultimate
skills.description: Cash in the loyalty, point at the board, and do the very unfair thing.

effects.message: Your Planeswalker Ultimate crashes into {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Untap Step
skills.description: Whenever you spend Mana Spectrum, untap and recover one Energy per color spent.

skills.name: Chromatic Lantern
skills.description: Bring three colors online at once and shelter behind the prismatic ward while the spectrum stabilizes.

effects.message: Chromatic light scorches {target} for {damage} damage.
The lantern's ward guards {guard} damage while three colors come online.

skills.name: Cyclonic Rift
skills.description: Spend three colors to overload the field, tear open the target's position, and leave nothing nearby to strike back cleanly.

effects.message: An overloaded rift tears through {target} for {damage} damage.
The emptied battlefield guards {guard} damage from three attacks.

skills.name: Five-Color Cascade
skills.description: Turn one spell into a chain of answers that hits hard and pulls two more colors into the Mana Spectrum.

effects.message: Five-Color Cascade hurls spell after spell into {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Five-Color Ultimatum
skills.description: Spend a complete Mana Spectrum and make reality answer every color of magic at once.

effects.message: Every color answers at once; the ultimatum erases {target} for {damage} damage.
The afterimage guards {guard} damage while reality reseals.

mechanic.name: Mana Spectrum
mechanic.description: Spells fix and widen your Mana Spectrum. Each color increases spell damage; Counterspell and the Ultimate turn stored colors into payoff.

jobs.name: Pilot
jobs.description: A Gundam Pilot who treats runaway card monsters like mobile suits: lock on, draw the beam saber, and launch from the catapult.

skills.name: Beam Saber Slash
skills.description: Draw the beam saber and make one clean mobile-suit cut.

effects.message: Your Beam Saber Slash tags {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Gundam Shield Bash
skills.description: Lead with the Gundam shield, dealing damage while absorbing the counterblow.

effects.message: Your Gundam Shield Bash slams {target} for {damage} damage.
The Gundam shield absorbs {guard} damage before it breaks away.

skills.name: Funnel Lock-On
skills.description: Send the funnels wide, paint the target, and let the lock-on do the talking.

effects.message: Your Funnel Lock-On burns across {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Catapult Launch
skills.description: Launch from the carrier catapult with enough force to brace through impact.

effects.message: Your Catapult Launch crushes {target} for {damage} damage.
The launch brace steadies you against the counterblow.

skills.name: Full Armor Gundam
skills.description: Bring every Full Armor module online for one heavy beam-finisher.

effects.message: Full Armor Gundam hammers {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Haro Predictive OS
skills.description: Haro solves the opening trajectory before your weapons clear; every duel starts with 1 Target Lock.

skills.name: Minovsky Particle Screen
skills.description: Flood the combat space with particles, scramble return fire, and finish painting the target.

effects.message: Minovsky particles scatter the return fire, screening {guard} damage.

skills.name: I-Field Intercept
skills.description: Spend a firing solution to raise an I-Field that catches the next volleys cold.

effects.message: The I-Field catches the next volleys, absorbing {guard} damage each time.

skills.name: All-Range Funnel Storm
skills.description: Surround the enemy with an all-range attack that also sharpens the next firing solution.

effects.message: Funnels cross every escape vector and rake {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Full Burst: Last Shooting
skills.description: Commit a complete Target Lock and fire every remaining weapon down the final vector.

effects.message: Every weapon fires on the final vector, blasting {target} for {damage} damage.

mechanic.name: Target Lock
mechanic.description: Basic fire and funnel work paint the target. Each lock sharply increases attack damage before heavy launch skills spend the solution.

jobs.name: Captain
jobs.description: A Straw Hat-style Captain with Gum-Gum reach, crew-first instincts, and absolutely no interest in leaving treasure behind.

skills.name: Gum-Gum Pistol
skills.description: Stretch across the street and hit the monster with a classic Gum-Gum opener.

effects.message: Your Gum-Gum Pistol hits {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Straw Hat Rally
skills.description: Rally the crew for a hit that also steels you against the answer.

effects.message: Your Straw Hat Rally rattles {target} for {damage} damage.
Straw Hat spirit guards {guard} damage from incoming trouble.

skills.name: Gum-Gum Gatling
skills.description: Turn one windup into a whole storm of rubber-limbed punches.

effects.message: Your Gum-Gum Gatling clobbers {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Gear Second
skills.description: Kick into Gear Second, rush the prize, and shrug off the counterattack.

effects.message: Gear Second crashes into {target} for {damage} damage.
Gear Second leaves you too fired up to fold.

skills.name: Gear Fifth
skills.description: Let the ridiculous freedom of Gear Fifth turn danger into a finishing gag.

effects.message: Gear Fifth blasts {target} for {damage} damage.
You plant yourself between danger and the crew.

skills.name: The Captain's Wake
skills.description: Every ordinary swing pulls the crew forward; basic attacks now build 2 Crew Momentum.

skills.name: All Hands on Deck!
skills.description: Call every crewmate into formation, close ranks, and drive the whole ship forward.

effects.message: The crew closes ranks, guarding {guard} damage from each incoming hit.

skills.name: Sanji's Victory Feast
skills.description: Spend some of the crew's momentum on a battle-ready course that restores the whole formation.

effects.message: A victory-course refill restores {healing} HP.
The fed crew braces you for {guard} damage.

skills.name: Conqueror's Haki
skills.description: Overwhelm the field with a captain's will and turn the crew's answer into fresh momentum.

effects.message: Conqueror's Haki crashes over {target} for {damage} damage.
The crew rallies behind your will, guarding {guard} damage.

skills.name: Bajrang Gun: Dawn Breaker
skills.description: Cash in a full crew charge and drop one impossible punch like a new dawn.

effects.message: Bajrang Gun drops like a new dawn and crushes {target} for {damage} damage.
You land between the threat and your crew, guarding {guard} damage.

mechanic.name: Crew Momentum
mechanic.description: Every committed swing and crew call builds Crew Momentum. Momentum strengthens attacks and the guard you put between danger and the crew.

jobs.name: Arena Fighter
jobs.description: A Union Arena brawler who spends AP, checks triggers, raids into bigger bodies, and turns crossovers into win conditions.

skills.name: AP Assist
skills.description: Call a crossover assist that clips the enemy, brings hype back to your side, and builds AP.

effects.message: Your AP Assist blindsides {target} for {damage} damage.
The assist hype restores {healing} HP.

skills.name: Special Trigger
skills.description: Flip a Special Trigger and make the matchup rules briefly everyone else's problem.

effects.message: Your Special Trigger scrambles {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Step Counter
skills.description: Use Step timing to hop lines, reappear with momentum, and blunt the response.

effects.message: Your Step Counter lands on {target} for {damage} damage.
A Step transition blunts the next hit.

skills.name: Raid Team-Up
skills.description: Raid into the front line with the whole lineup behind you for damage and recovery.

effects.message: Your Raid Team-Up hits {target} for {damage} damage.
The Raid energy restores {healing} HP.

skills.name: Final Trigger
skills.description: Flip the Final Trigger and turn the crossover pileup into one decisive blow.

effects.message: Your Final Trigger overwhelms {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: AP Refresh Protocol
skills.description: Every AP actually spent readies part of the next play, refunding 1 Energy per AP spent.

skills.name: Active Trigger
skills.description: Check an Active Trigger to refresh the lineup, ready a blocker, and bank more AP.

effects.message: The Active Trigger refreshes your lineup for {healing} HP.
A readied blocker guards {guard} damage.

skills.name: Blocker Line-Up
skills.description: Spend AP to fill the front line with bodies that refuse to let the attack through.

effects.message: Your Blocker line absorbs {guard} damage from each incoming hit.

skills.name: Double Impact Raid
skills.description: Punch through the front line with a double-impact entry that leaves the next trigger live.

effects.message: Double Impact punches through the front line and hits {target} for {damage} damage.

skills.name: Championship Final Trigger
skills.description: Resolve a full AP stack into the championship sequence: crowd surge first, decisive crossover second.

effects.message: The championship crowd restores {healing} HP.
Every crossover line resolves at once, overwhelming {target} for {damage} damage.

mechanic.name: Action Points
mechanic.description: Assists, triggers, and clean Step timing build AP. Stored AP improves damage, healing, and guard before raid and final triggers spend it.

species.name: Cardbound
species.description: A modern-day player caught in the monster-card outbreak.
